# Conan - C and C++ Package Manager

> Conan is an open source, decentralized package manager for C and C++ that works on all platforms (Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, etc.) and with all build systems and compilers. It manages pre-compiled binaries, avoiding repeated builds from source, and accelerates development and CI.

- [Full documentation as single file](https://docs.conan.io/2/llms-full.txt): All pages concatenated into one file for bulk ingestion

- The latest version is Conan 2.28.
- Conan 2 is the current major version. Conan 1.x is legacy and should not be used for new projects.
- Conan is NOT a build system. It integrates with CMake, MSBuild, Meson, Autotools, Bazel, and others via generators.
- Packages are defined by a `conanfile.py` recipe (or `conanfile.txt` for consumers). One recipe can generate binaries for multiple configurations (OS, arch, compiler, build type).
- Conan uses a client-server architecture. Packages are stored in remotes (JFrog Artifactory or conan_server). ConanCenter is the central public repository for open source libraries.
- The binary model computes a `package_id` based on settings, options, and dependencies to determine binary compatibility.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.conan.io/2/installation.html.md): Install Conan via pip, installers, or from source
- [Introduction](https://docs.conan.io/2/introduction.html.md): Architecture overview, binary management, decentralized model, stability guarantees

## Tutorial

- [Consuming packages](https://docs.conan.io/2/tutorial/consuming_packages.html.md): Use existing libraries with Conan, build with CMake, handle multiple configurations
- [Creating packages](https://docs.conan.io/2/tutorial/creating_packages.html.md): Create your own Conan packages from source, define settings, options, and dependencies
- [Working with Conan repositories](https://docs.conan.io/2/tutorial/conan_repositories.html.md): Set up remotes, upload packages, contribute to ConanCenter
- [Developing packages locally](https://docs.conan.io/2/tutorial/developing_packages.html.md): Local development flow, editable packages, package layout, workspaces
- [Versioning](https://docs.conan.io/2/tutorial/versioning.html.md): Version ranges, revisions, lockfiles, dependency conflicts

## CI/CD and DevOps

- [CI Tutorial](https://docs.conan.io/2/ci_tutorial/tutorial.html.md): Set up Conan in CI pipelines, packages pipeline, products pipeline
- [DevOps guide](https://docs.conan.io/2/devops/devops.html.md): Production deployment patterns for teams and organizations
- [Using ConanCenter in production](https://docs.conan.io/2/devops/using_conancenter.html.md): Best practices for using open source packages in production
- [Package promotions](https://docs.conan.io/2/devops/package_promotions.html.md): Promote packages across repositories and environments
- [Save and restore packages](https://docs.conan.io/2/devops/save_restore.html.md): Backup and transfer packages between Conan caches
- [Metadata](https://docs.conan.io/2/devops/metadata.html.md): Managing package metadata files

## Integrations

- [CMake](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/cmake.html.md): CMake integration with generators (CMakeDeps, CMakeToolchain) and presets
- [Visual Studio / MSBuild](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/visual_studio.html.md): MSBuild generators and Visual Studio integration
- [Meson](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/meson.html.md): Meson build system integration
- [Bazel](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/bazel.html.md): Bazel build system integration
- [Autotools](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/autotools.html.md): Autotools (configure/make) integration
- [Makefile](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/makefile.html.md): Plain Makefile integration
- [Xcode](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/xcode.html.md): Xcode project integration for macOS/iOS
- [Premake](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/premake.html.md): Premake build system integration
- [Android](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/android.html.md): Android NDK cross-compilation
- [ROS](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/ros.html.md): ROS (Robot Operating System) integration
- [JFrog](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/jfrog.html.md): JFrog Artifactory and Platform integration
- [GitHub Actions](https://docs.conan.io/2/integrations/github.html.md): GitHub CI integration

## Reference

- [Commands](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/commands.html.md): All Conan CLI commands (install, create, upload, search, etc.)
- [conanfile.py](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/conanfile.html.md): Complete conanfile.py reference (attributes, methods, build helpers)
- [conanfile.txt](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/conanfile_txt.html.md): conanfile.txt format reference for consumers
- [Configuration files](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/config_files.html.md): global.conf, settings.yml, profiles, remotes.json
- [Recipe tools](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/tools.html.md): Built-in helpers (conan.tools.cmake, conan.tools.meson, conan.tools.microsoft, etc.)
- [Binary model](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/binary_model.html.md): How Conan computes package_id and binary compatibility
- [Extensions](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/extensions.html.md): Custom commands, hooks, plugins, deployers, profile plugins
- [Environment variables](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/environment.html.md): Conan environment variables reference
- [Runners](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/runners.html.md): Docker and remote build execution runners
- [Workspace files](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/workspace_files.html.md): Workspace configuration file reference
- [conan_server](https://docs.conan.io/2/reference/conan_server.html.md): Self-hosted Conan package server

## Migrating to Conan 2

- [What's new in Conan 2](https://docs.conan.io/2/whatsnew.html.md): Latest features, changes, and migration guide from Conan 1.x

## Security

- [Security](https://docs.conan.io/2/security/security.html.md): Package signing, source verification, audit, SBOM, compiler sanitizers

## Optional

- [Examples](https://docs.conan.io/2/examples.html.md): Hands-on examples for specific features (cross-building, graph, dev flow, extensions)
- [Knowledge base](https://docs.conan.io/2/knowledge.html.md): FAQ, cheat sheet, core guidelines, videos, community resources
- [Changelog](https://docs.conan.io/2/changelog.html.md): Full release history
- [Incubating features](https://docs.conan.io/2/incubating.html.md): Experimental and preview features
